codeReview.summary: The feature mostly redirects verify-core validation toward CLI-oriented commands, but the committed shared-state files still point the acceptance fixture to the old `tests/fixtures` path. That regresses the intended standardized verification asset location and leaves the validator gate inconsistent with the current project guidance.

issues.description: `room-verify-fixture` still uses `tests/fixtures/room_compute_validation.json`, but the mission's shared library and current init guidance standardize on `verification/room/compute/room_compute_validation.json`. Because this command is part of the validator gate, automation following services.yaml will validate against the deprecated path and drift from the agreed CLI workflow.

The init script checks for and prints the old `tests/fixtures/room_compute_validation.json` path instead of the standardized `verification/room/compute/room_compute_validation.json`. This leaves mission bootstrap output inconsistent with `.factory/library/room-verify-json-validation.md` and the current services contract, so operators can be guided to the wrong fixture location.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature had to relax `backend-worker` so CLI-only validation is allowed, but the skill still presents web-server-specific implementation examples (`src/web_server/models.rs`, `handlers.rs`) inside the generic procedure. That makes the procedure partially misleading for CLI-focused backend tasks and likely contributed to the worker needing to justify a deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:25-35 still anchors implementation guidance around `src/web_server/*` even after adding CLI validation language; handoff.skillFeedback for `c2175d33-b819-49cd-8512-502f0379f1c6` reports a procedure deviation because the prior guidance conflicted with this mission.

summary: Reviewed handoff `c2175d33-b819-49cd-8512-502f0379f1c6`, commit `0e9b92f`, the transcript skeleton, and the shared mission docs. The change correctly removes the broad `cargo test` gate, but it does not fully align the shared validator/bootstrap commands with the current standardized verification fixture location, so the feature fails review.
